steps.title: Identify the constraint-to-alternative pivot
steps.content: The first sentence explains why Kepler-296e won't help us soon: distance makes it unreachable. The next sentence says humanity should focus on our solar system instead. The transition must signal a shift from an impractical goal to an alternative we should pursue.

steps.title: Match the alternative signal
steps.content:
Instead, marks a turn from one course of action to an alternative—exactly what's needed when Kepler-296e is too far to use and we must focus on our solar system.

The other three don't work: Likewise suggests the statements are parallel, For example frames it as evidence rather than a new direction, and Next implies sequence rather than alternatives.

That matches choice B—B is correct.
